title: Talent Acquisition Specialist
summary: Talent Acquisition Specialist with 4 years of experience. Focused on measurable outcomes, cross-functional collaboration and reliable knowledge graph extraction signals. Core strengths include Training, ATS, Onboarding, SAP SuccessFactors.
